sections.title: Speaking to Vestri to start the quest

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Hmmph. What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just wondering what was down those stairs?

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: You can't go down there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't want to anyway.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Good. Because you can't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Because I don't want to.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Because you can't. So that's fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, it is.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Yes. Fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Well then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: This is the home of the Mountain Dwarves. How would you like it if I wanted to take a shortcut through your home?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooh... is this a shortcut to somewhere?

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Well, it is a lot easier to go this way to get past White Wolf Mountain than through those wolf filled passes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry, I hadn't realised it was private.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Well, it is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you were my friend I wouldn't mind.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Yes, but I don't even know you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, let's be friends!

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: I'd rather not, thank you.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: I'd rather not, thank you.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: I don't make friends easily. People need to earn my trust first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And how am I meant to do that?

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: My, we are the persistent one aren't we?

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Well, there's a certain gold artefact we're after. We dwarves are big fans of gold! This artefact is the first prize at the Hemenster fishing competition.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Fortunately we have acquired a pass to enter that competition...

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Unfortunately Dwarves don't make good fishermen.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fortunately I'm alright at fishing!

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Okay. I entrust you with our competition pass. Don't forget to take some gold with you for the entrance fee.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Go to Hemenster and do us proud!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a grumpy little man aren't you?

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Don't you know it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a grumpy little man aren't you?

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Don't you know it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm bigger than you. Let me by!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...stumpy.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Go away! You're not going to bully your way in HERE!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just stopping to say hello!

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Hello then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have a brother?

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: What if I do! It's no business of yours.

sections.title: Speaking to Austri to start the quest

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Hmmph. What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just wondering what was down those stairs?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: You can't go down there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't want to anyway.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Good. Because you can't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Because I don't want to.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Because you can't. So that's fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, it is.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Yes. Fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Well then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: This is the home of the Mountain Dwarves. How would you like it if I wanted to take a shortcut through your home?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooh... is this a shortcut to somewhere?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Well, it is a lot easier to go this way to get past White Wolf Mountain than through those wolf filled passes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry, I hadn't realised it was private.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you were my friend I wouldn't mind.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Yes, but I don't even know you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, let's be friends!

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: I'd rather not, thank you.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: I'd rather not, thank you.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: I don't make friends easily. People need to earn my trust first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And how am I meant to do that?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: My, we are the persistent one aren't we?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Well, there's a certain gold artefact we're after. We dwarves are big fans of gold! This artefact is the first prize at the Hemenster fishing competition.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Fortunately we have acquired a pass to enter that competition...

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Unfortunately Dwarves don't make good fishermen.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fortunately I'm alright at fishing!

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Okay. I entrust you with our competition pass. Don't forget to take some gold with you for the entrance fee.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Go to Hemenster and do us proud!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a grumpy little man aren't you?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Don't you know it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a grumpy little man aren't you?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Don't you know it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm bigger than you. Let me by!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...stumpy.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Go away! You're not going to bully your way in HERE!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just stopping to say hello!

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Hello then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have a brother?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: What if I do! It's no business of yours.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Have you won yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Well don't give up! Maybe old Jack can give you a few tips.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Have you won yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Well don't give up! Maybe old Jack can give you a few tips.

sections.title: Retrieving another fishing pass from Vestri

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Have you won yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another competition pass.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Hmmm. It's a good job they sent us spares.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: There you go. Try not to lose that one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, it takes preparation to win fishing competitions.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Maybe that's where we are going wrong when we try fishing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Probably.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Maybe we should talk to that old Jack fella near the competition, everyone seemed to be ranting about him.

sections.title: Retrieving another fishing pass from Austri

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Have you won yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another competition pass.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Hmmm. It's a good job they sent us spares.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: There you go. Try not to lose that one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, it takes preparation to win fishing competitions.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Maybe that's where we are going wrong when we try fishing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Probably.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Maybe we should talk to that old Jack fella near the competition, everyone seemed to be ranting about him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you sitting around here for?

lines.speaker: Morris
lines.text: I'm making sure only those with a competition pass enter the fishing contest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have one here.

lines.speaker: Morris
lines.text: Move on through. Talk to Bonzo to enter the competition.

lines.speaker: Morris
lines.text: Competition pass please.

lines.speaker: Morris
lines.text: Move on through. Talk to Bonzo to enter the competition.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Sinister Stranger
lines.text: My name iz Vlad. I come from far avay, vere the sun iz not so bright.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a vampyre aren't you?

lines.speaker: Sinister Stranger
lines.text: Just because I can't stand ze smell ov garlic und I don't like bright sunlight doesn't necessarily mean I'm ein vampyre!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it nice there?

lines.speaker: Sinister Stranger
lines.text: It is vonderful! Ze vomen are beautiful und ze nights are long!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, good luck with the fishing.

lines.speaker: Sinister Stranger
lines.text: Luck haz notsing to do vith it it is all in ze technique.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... you like fishing?

lines.speaker: Sinister Stranger
lines.text: My doctor told me to take up ein velaxing hobby. Vhen I am stressed I tend to get ein little..

lines.speaker: Sinister Stranger
lines.text: ..thirsty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you get thirsty you should drink something.

lines.speaker: Sinister Stranger
lines.text: I tsink I may do zat soon...

lines.speaker: Big Dave
lines.text: Hey guy! Always nice to see a fresh face!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're the champ?

lines.speaker: Big Dave
lines.text: That's right, guy! Ain't nobody better at fishing round here than me! That's for sure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I fish here instead of you?

lines.speaker: Big Dave
lines.text: Sorry guy! This is my lucky spot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any tips for me?

lines.speaker: Big Dave
lines.text: Why would I help you? I wanna stay the best! I'm not givin' away my secrets like old Grampa Jack does!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's Grampa Jack?

lines.speaker: Big Dave
lines.text: You really have no clue do you! He won this competition four years in a row! He lives in the house just outside the gate.

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Yeah? What you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... nothing really...

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Quit bugging me then! I got me some fish to catch!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I fish here instead of you?

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Nuh uh dude. Less talk, more fishing!

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Dude! Why should I help you? You like, might beat me! I'm not giving away my secrets like that dude Grampa Jack does!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's Grampa Jack?

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Who's Grampa Jack [he says/she says/they say]! He won this competition four years in a row! He lives in the house just outside the gate.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Hello young man! Come to visit old Grandpa Jack? I can tell ye stories for sure. I used to be the best fisherman these parts have seen!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me a story then.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Well, when I were a young man we used to take fishing trips over to Catherby; The fishing over there - now that was something!

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Anyway, we decided to do a bit of fishing with our nets, I wasn't having the best of days turning up nothing but old boots and bits of seaweed. Then my net suddenly got really heavy!

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: To my amazement I'd caught this little chest thing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you entering the fishing competition?

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Ah... the Hemenster fishing competition...

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: I know all about that... I won that four years straight! I'm too old for that lark now though...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't suppose you could give me any hints?

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Well, you sometimes get these really big fish in the water just by the outflow pipes.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: I think they're some kind of carp...

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: I used to get those from McGrubor's wood, north of here. Just dig around in the red vines up there but be careful of the guard dogs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's this weird creepy guy who says he's not a vampyre using that spot. He keeps winning too.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Ahh well, I'm sure you'll find something to put him off. After all, there must be a kitchen around here with some garlic in it, perhaps in Seers Village or Ardougne. If he's pretending to be a vampyre then he can pretend to be scared of garlic!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're right! Thanks Jack!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's less competition for me then.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Why you young whippersnapper! If I was twenty years younger I'd show you something that's for sure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have time now.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Sigh...

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Young people - always in such a rush.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy one of your fishing rods?

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: But young man, you have your own. I'll not sell you mine when you already have one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've forgotten how to fish, can you remind me?

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Of course! Let me see now...You'll need a rod and bait. You can fish with a net too, but not in the competition.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok... I think I can get those at Catherby.

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Then simply find yourself a fishing spot, either in the competition near here, or wherever you can - I recommend net fishing in Catherby. Net or Lure the fish in the fishing spot by clicking on it and then be

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: patient...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's that simple?

lines.speaker: Grandpa Jack
lines.text: Yep! Go get em tiger.

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Hey, you need to pay to enter the competition first! Only 5 gp entrance fee!

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Ok, we've got all the fishermen! It's time to roll!

sections.title: Trying to pay Bonzo during the competition

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: You've already paid, you don't need to pay me again!

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Roll up, roll up!

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Enter the great Hemenster fishing competition!

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Only 5gp entrance fee!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll enter the competition please.

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Ok, nearly everyone is in their place already. You fish in the spot by the willow tree, and the Sinister Stranger, you fish by the pipes.

lines.speaker: Sinister Stranger
lines.text: Arrgh! WHAT is that GHASTLY smell??? I think I will move over here instead...

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Hmm. You'd better go and take the area by the pipes then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'll just watch the fun.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ewww - it's a smelly sewage pipe.

sections.title: Putting the garlic into the wall pipe

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: So you're calling it quits here for now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I'll compete again another day.

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Ok, I'll see you again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually I'll go back and catch some more.

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Good luck!

sections.title: Speaking to Bonzo after catching a fish

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: So how are you doing so far?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I caught some fish! Here...

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: And the winner is... The stranger in black!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have this big fish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it enough to win?

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Well, we'll just wait till time is up.

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: We have a new winner! The heroic-looking person who was fishing by the pipes has caught the biggest carp I've seen since Grandpa Jack used to compete!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I might still be able to find a bigger fish.

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Ok, good luck!

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Hello champ!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't feel like a champ...

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Why not champ?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost my fishing trophy...

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: Is that all chump? Don't worry, I have a spare!

lines.speaker: Bonzo
lines.text: So any hints on how to fish?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll keep them to myself.

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Have you won yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I have!

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Well done! That's brilliant! Do you have the trophy with you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yep, I have it right here!

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Oh! It's even more shiny and gold than I thought possible...

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: You've done us proud. Thank you [lad/lass]. I think we can now trust you enough to let you in...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In where?

lines.speaker: Vestri
lines.text: Why the tunnel of course! You may now come and go freely, avoiding the wolves and dangers of the cold, high mountain. You could even stop in for a beer or two!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excellent. That will come in most handy.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Have you won yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I have!

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Well done! That's brilliant! Do you have the trophy with you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yep, I have it right here!

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Oh! It's even more shiny and gold than I thought possible...

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Welcome, oh great Fishing Champion! Feel free to pop by and use our tunnel any time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, I think I'll stop by for a beer one day.
